# Transfer Prompt

Load this package as the current Ordo Benchmark Creation Playbook baseline. First verify `SHA256SUMS.txt`; on mismatch stop with no change. Read `handoff/HANDOFF_README.md`, `handoff/CURRENT_STATE.md`, `BACKLOG.md`, and `handoff/NEXT_ACTION.md`. Preserve all IDs and completed evidence. Do not downgrade. Continue only with the open task `BL-BENCH-041`, unless the owner explicitly changes scope.
